feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Code Red
entry.summary:
Author: Maybe_Here

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,956Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 61

Summary: Flatmates can be a real gamble. Sometimes they're normal. Sometimes they wear masks and wield guns. You move to Gotham to start at a new job at the General Hospital, but with limited options you have to move into a sketchy apartment.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The lock you checked three times
entry.summary:
Author: Angelina_2206

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,806Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Jason Todd is a problem.Leather jacket. Knuckle tape. And permanent smirk. He gets in fights, smokes behind the gym, and teachers are torn between expelling him and begging him to apply to Ivy Leagues.You're the transfer from Metropolis.Quiet. Broke. Living in a basement apartment that floods when it rains. You work two jobs, and don't talk about why you left your old school.You made a mistake and Jason stopped talking to you.Except at night, because thats when Red hood watches you

entry.title: Where the Lazarus Flowers Grow
entry.summary:
Author: fieldsofhyacinth

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,880Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Because years ago, beneath desert ruins and green fire, he had met a girl with death in her veins and flowers stitched into her gloves. And if anyone could stop this thing…

entry.title: When Luck Smiles Your Way
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,838Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 15

Summary: After having a life as complicated as the one he had, Jason thought that his luck wouldn't face him until the day of his (second) death. But, the universe always had ways of surprising him. And now, he had to deal with the feelings that a fortunate meeting had left him even if he had no idea how.

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,438Chapters: 5/25Kudos: 153

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books.Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger or three as Red Hood.Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off. Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood. Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.title: You And Me, We'd Be A Big Conversation
entry.summary:
Author: scytheanstasia

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,480Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Spin off(ish) of my first work Now That Your Rose Is In Bloom but more centric on the Titans/Jason and no polyamory cause I fell out of love with the second love interest. Follows the same plot for the first handful of chapters and then it takes its own place in season 3. Jason is trans in this fic but she comes out after the Red Hood arc ends. BUT! I am making a sequel to this book because this story ends rather quickly after season 3 (season 4 doesn't exist sorry I hate tim and bernard and whatshisname) Rewrite of Titans to insert a Jason x reader

entry.title: Even the Sun Cries Sometimes (Full Fic)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,482Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 75

Summary: “You’re not smoking again are you?” You take a drag as you contemplate your reply, watching the smoke coil above you and float away. “It’s been a long day, Steph.” “Talk to me.” You shake your head despite her not being able to see it. “No, it’s alright. I just didn’t sleep well last night. Tired is all.” She hums as if she doesn’t believe you. “You don’t need me to tell you that smoking is bad for you.” You scoff. “If smoking was so bad, God wouldn’t have made tobacco. In fact, if he wants me to stop smoking, may he give me a sign right now, and I swear I will quit for good!” “You don’t even believe in-” *BANG!*, *CRASH!* *THUD!* OR: I wrote a hurt/comfort one shot between Jason Todd and the Reader, and then got inspo to turn it into a full fic. Thank you flamingoesareawesome

entry.title: There's Just Something About You Baby
entry.summary:
Author: ghst06

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,371Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: She's a daycare teacher in Gotham trying her best to survive in a city she can never seem to escape. Jayda is trying to find herself outside of being the red hood for the first time since she came back to life. What happens when two lost people meet in a city both of them can't seem to abandon? This is butch lesbian Jason Todd/ femme lesbian reader, Jason is named Jayda in this fic.I've never posted a fic before so any constructive feedback is welcome!! I'll update as often as I can.

entry.title: Collection of My 2026 Domaystic fics
entry.summary:
Author: RedSakura101

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,122Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Just a collection of my different domaystic fics for 2026. All are x reader fics Characters include:Jason ToddJamie TarttDennis WhitakerMichael 'Robby' RobinavitchJack AbbotBrendon Park 'the Shark'Jesse Van Horn These have all been crossposted to my Tumblr @redsakura101 (I have not done every single day/prompt, just the ones that inspired me ♥️) Hope you enjoy!!

entry.title: The Garden and the Gun
entry.summary:
Author: Knight_Ana

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,859Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Gotham City — but not the high-rise chaos we usually see. The story focuses on a small, older neighborhood just outside Crime Alley. It’s rough around the edges but alive — full of community, old shops, and people trying to do good in a rotting city. (y/n) works in a flower shop run by an elderly couple who treat them like family. They also volunteer at a local community center, helping street kids and runaways — some of whom have been directly affected by Gotham’s gang wars.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Burial Rites
entry.summary:
Author: Morveren

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,847Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 84

Summary: She'll hate you, Bruce wanted to say.Because Jason did.She wouldn't want anything to do with you, Bruce wanted to say.Because Jason didn't.You're going to spend the rest of your life knowing that, given the chance, you would do it all over again. Years after Bruce used the Lazarus Pit to resurrect him, Jason realizes that he's willing to commit the same sins his father did.

entry.title: Pulled Apart.
entry.summary:
Author: MysticMaid

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,408Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 19

Summary: In which Theresa (you) is a therapist at Grady Memorial Psychiatric Hospital by day and an exotic dancer at a club on the south side of Gotham by night. Theresa (you) is running from a past full of debt that seems to keep catching up to her, how will she handle hiding her true identity and balance her new patient at work that seems to want nothing to do with her? … Jason Todd poses as billionaire Bruce Wayne’s son while living a life of secret in the shadows of Gotham as the vigilante Red Hood. Jason Todd is living with PTSD after dying then being resurrected. Jason Todd assaults a police officer during an episode of his and has to attend court-ordered therapy sessions with a therapist (you) that bores him to death.

entry.summary:

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,568Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 8
